sentences.target: Yo camino al trabajo cada mañana.

translations.es: Yo camino al trabajo cada mañana.
translations.en: I walk to work every morning.
translations.fr: Je vais au travail à pied chaque matin.
translations.de: Ich gehe jeden Morgen zu Fuß zur Arbeit.
translations.it: Vado al lavoro a piedi ogni mattina.
translations.ru: Я хожу на работу пешком каждое утро.
translations.pt: Eu vou a pé para o trabalho todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אני הולך לעבודה כל בוקר ברגל.
translations.vi: Tôi đi bộ đến chỗ làm mỗi sáng.
translations.ar: أنا أمشي إلى العمل كل صباح.
translations.nl: Ik loop elke ochtend naar mijn werk.
translations.uk: Я ходжу на роботу пішки щоранку.
translations.hu: Minden reggel gyalog megyek a munkába.
translations.hi: मैं हर सुबह काम पर पैदल जाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chodzę do pracy pieszo każdego ranka.
translations.el: Πηγαίνω στη δουλειά με τα πόδια κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg går til jobb hver morgen.
translations.id: Saya berjalan kaki ke kantor setiap pagi.
translations.sv: Jag går till jobbet varje morgon.
translations.ro: Merg pe jos la muncă în fiecare dimineață.
translations.cs: Každé ráno chodím do práce pěšky.
translations.da: Jeg går på arbejde hver morgen.
translations.ja: 私は毎朝歩いて仕事に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, first person singular, functioning as the subject.
Finite verb in present indicative, first person singular.
Contraction of the preposition 'a' with the masculine singular determiner 'el'.
Common noun, masculine singular, object of the preposition.
Distributive determiner modifying the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular, head of the temporal phrase.

translations.en: Can you walk a little faster?
translations.fr: Peux-tu marcher un peu plus vite ?
translations.de: Kannst du ein bisschen schneller gehen?
translations.it: Puoi camminare un po' più veloce?
translations.ko: 조금 더 빨리 걸을 수 있어?
translations.pt: Você pode andar um pouco mais rápido?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đi bộ nhanh hơn một chút không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك أن تمشي أسرع قليلًا؟
translations.nl: Kun je een beetje sneller lopen?
translations.hi: क्या तुम थोड़ा तेज़ चल सकते हो?
translations.el: Μπορείς να περπατήσεις λίγο πιο γρήγορα;
translations.id: Bisakah kamu berjalan sedikit lebih cepat?
translations.ro: Poți să mergi puțin mai repede?
translations.ja: もう少し速く歩けますか。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb in present indicative, second person singular.
Non-finite verb in infinitive form.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, modifying the following noun.
Noun used here as part of the quantifying expression 'un poco'.
Degree adverb indicating increase.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating manner.

sentences.target: Vamos a caminar después de comer.

translations.es: Vamos a caminar después de comer.
translations.en: Let's go for a walk after eating.
translations.fr: Allons nous promener après avoir mangé.
translations.de: Lass uns nach dem Essen spazieren gehen.
translations.it: Andiamo a fare una passeggiata dopo aver mangiato.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们吃完饭后去散步吧。
translations.yue: 我哋食完嘢之後去散步啦。
translations.pt: Vamos dar um passeio depois de comer.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đi dạo sau khi ăn nhé.
translations.nl: Laten we na het eten gaan wandelen.
translations.hi: चलो खाने के बाद टहलने चलें।
translations.el: Ας πάμε για βόλτα μετά το φαγητό.
translations.nb: La oss gå en tur etter at vi har spist.
translations.sv: Låt oss gå ut och gå efter att vi har ätit.
translations.ro: Hai să mergem la plimbare după ce mâncăm.
translations.cs: Pojďme se jít po jídle projít.
translations.da: Lad os gå en tur efter at have spist.
translations.ja: 食べたあとに散歩に行こう。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb in present indicative, first person plural; also commonly used for a periphrastic future/intention construction.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement.
Non-finite verb in infinitive form.
Temporal adverb introducing a subordinate prepositional phrase with 'de'.
Preposition linking 'después' with the infinitive clause.
Non-finite verb in infinitive form.

sentences.target: Ella camina con su perro por la tarde.
sentences.reading: /ˈe.ʝa kaˈmi.na kon su ˈpe.ro poɾ la ˈtaɾ.ðe/

translations.es: Ella camina con su perro por la tarde.
translations.ipa: /ˈe.ʝa kaˈmi.na kon su ˈpe.ro poɾ la ˈtaɾ.ðe/
translations.en: She walks her dog in the afternoon.
translations.de: Sie geht am Nachmittag mit ihrem Hund spazieren.
translations.it: Lei porta a spasso il suo cane nel pomeriggio.
translations.ru: Она гуляет со своей собакой днем.
translations.pt: Ela passeia com o cachorro à tarde.
translations.he: היא מטיילת עם הכלב שלה אחר הצהריים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy dắt chó đi dạo vào buổi chiều.
translations.ar: هي تمشي مع كلبها بعد الظهر.
translations.nl: Zij wandelt ’s middags met haar hond.
translations.hi: वह दोपहर में अपने कुत्ते को घुमाती है।
translations.pl: Ona spaceruje z psem po południu.
translations.el: Η ίδια βγάζει βόλτα τον σκύλο της το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Hun går tur med hunden sin på ettermiddagen.
translations.id: Dia mengajak anjingnya jalan-jalan sore hari.
translations.sv: Hon promenerar med sin hund på eftermiddagen.
translations.da: Hun går tur med sin hund om eftermiddagen.
translations.ja: 彼女は午後に犬の散歩をします。
